headline: Orang Sungai Community Faces Forced Relocation in Sabah
context: The 4,500-member Orang Sungai community along Kinabatangan River received relocation notices in February 2026 for flood mitigation project.

cards.big: 4,500 Orang Sungai face forced relocation for RM1.8 billion flood project
cards.sub: Community occupied Kinabatangan riverbanks for over 200 years without formal title

cards.big: Relocation offers RM25,000 per household for 320 affected families
cards.sub: Community lawyers argue amount covers less than 10% of actual value

cards.big: Proposed relocation site is 45km from current settlement and fishing grounds
cards.sub: Orang Sungai depend on river fishing for 70% of food and 60% of income

cards.big: Flood project contractor linked to company with 3 other RM4.2 billion contracts
cards.sub: Opposition MPs questioned procurement process in parliamentary session

cards.big: Forced relocation tests whether infrastructure development requires community consent
Forced relocation of Orang Sungai communities repeats a pattern of displacing those with least political power.
